title: Test City 2099
summary: A smoke-choked metropolis run by three warring megacorps.

title: Silt & Silicon: The Drowning Metropolis
summary: Jakarta is a submerged labyrinth where the elite hide in pressurized arcologies while the rest scavenge the rusted remains of the old world beneath a permanent chemical haze. In this neon-lit abyss, information is the only currency that doesn't dissolve in the acidic rainwater.

title: The Lion’s Halo
summary: Orbital Singapore hangs like a diamond-encrusted predator over the scorched equator, a claustrophobic maze of pressurized wet-markets and rain-slicked carbon fiber where the air smells of ozone and cheap soy. Below the glistening corporate spires, a neon-veined underworld thrives in the artificial humidity, where data-runners trade stolen lives while the gravity-wells hum with the vibration of a thousand desperate secrets.
